title: jumellea triquetra
intro: Jumellea triquetra is a type of orchid, specifically a species of terrestrial orchid found in the tropical regions of Africa and Madagascar. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Jumellea triquetra include its potential to aid in the treatment of various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Jumellea triquetra can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
